since_last: 71% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.63%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.64% · Gold +0.26% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 71% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.63%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.63%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: PANW is the standout at +9.14%
cards.body: Leaders: PANW +9.14%, AMBA +7.85%, BIDU +7.64%, TER +6.03%, CRWD +5.96%. Laggards: SYNA -2.99%, DLR -1.25%, TLN -1.18%, SPCX -1.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.02% at $162.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
